case_title: CORDONERO LYDIA VS ARRIOLA EDGAR PAUL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CORDONERO LYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT ARRIOLA EDGAR PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARRIOLA EDGAR PAUL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-1990, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-19-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
CORRECTED DATE WHEN CONTINUANCE WAS ORDERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDONERO LYDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARRIOLA EDGAR PAUL $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,012.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE CONTINUED TO 7-19-90 AT 8:00 AM BECAUSE DEFENDANT DISAGREED TO HAVE A PRO-TEM.
